name: cs2-demo-analysis-kit
description: Reusable CS2 demo analysis models, QA reports, and previewable UI components.

scripts.python:test: cd python && uv run --extra dev pytest
scripts.python:export:sample: cd python && uv run cs2dak export ../fixtures/demos/nju-rivals-2026/3671816592_1000003075.dem --out ../fixtures/output/nju-rivals-2026
scripts.python:export:pro: cd python && uv run cs2dak export ../fixtures/demos/pro/*.dem --out ../fixtures/output/pro
scripts.python:export:nju: cd python && uv run cs2dak export ../fixtures/demos/nju-rivals-2026/*.dem --out ../fixtures/output/nju-rivals-2026
scripts.release:npm: pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && changeset publish
